2604.05952.title: Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration
2604.05952.paper_summary: As agent-based systems continue to evolve, deep research agents are capable of automatically generating research-style reports across diverse domains. While these agents promise to streamline information synthesis and knowledge exploration, existing evaluation frameworks-typically based on subjective dimensions-fail to capture a critical aspect of report quality: trustworthiness. In open-ended research scenarios where ground-truth answers are unavailable, current evaluation methods cannot effectively measure the epistemic confidence of generated content, making calibration difficult and leaving users susceptible to misleading or hallucinated information. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research agent that incorporates progressive confidence estimation and calibration within the report generation pipeline. Our system leverages a deliberative search model, featuring deep retrieval and multi-hop reasoning to ground outputs in verifiable evidence while assigning confidence scores to individual claims. Combined with a carefully designed workflow, this approach produces trustworthy reports with enhanced transparency. Experimental results and case studies demonstrate that our method substantially improves interpretability and significantly increases user trust.
2604.05952.paper_summary_zh: 隨著基於代理的系統不斷發展，深度研究代理能夠自動生成涵蓋多個領域的研究風格報告。雖然這些代理承諾能簡化信息綜合和知識探索，但現有的評估框架——通常基於主觀維度——未能捕捉報告質量的一個關鍵方面：可信度。在缺乏真實答案的開放式研究場景中，當前的評估方法無法有效衡量生成內容的認識信心，這使得校準變得困難，並使得用戶容易受到誤導或幻覺信息的影響。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了一種新穎的深度研究代理，該代理在報告生成流程中融入了漸進式的信心估計和校準。我們的系統利用了一種深思熟慮的搜索模型，具有深度檢索和多跳推理的特點，將輸出基於可驗證的證據，同時為個別主張分配信心分數。結合精心設計的工作流程，這種方法生成的報告具有更高的可信度和透明度。實驗結果和案例研究表明，我們的方法顯著提高了可解釋性並顯著增加了用戶的信任。
2604.05952.author: Yi Yuan et.al.
2604.05952.authors: Yi Yuan, Xuhong Wang, Shanzhe Lei
